caption: A screen recording shows a user navigating a web browser. Initially, the page displays the "RANDOM.ORG" website with a "Dice Roller" tool showing a result of two dice. The view then shifts to a different page featuring a list of numbered names, including "Michael Loguercio" and "Ryan Prenell," alongside a chat window with messages from "Nightbot" and "OK!". The Nightbot message reads, "Click the link for the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE! >>> https://t.me/Z1eSk9K9". A banner for "CASEBREAKS.COM" appears at the bottom of the screen. A small inset video window in the lower right corner shows a man with a beard wearing a black t-shirt, speaking to the camera in a room with shelves of products behind him. As the sequence progresses, the browser window scrolls down through the list of names, which continues up to "30. Ryan Cason".
